name: Robert Scaringe
background: Dr. Scaringe is our founder and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and a member of our Board since our founding in 2009. Dr. Scaringe holds a B.S. in Mechanical Engineering from Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute and an M.S. and Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.

company_affiliations.name: Rivian Automotive, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Chairman of the Board
